translations.en: Muhammad ibn al-Qasim narrated to us. He said: Yusuf ibn Muhammad ibn Ziyad and Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Sayyar narrated to me, from their two fathers, from al-Hasan ibn Ali, from his father Ali ibn Muhammad, from his father Muhammad ibn Ali, from his father al-Rida Ali ibn Musa, from his father Musa ibn Ja’far, from his father Ja’far ibn Muhammad, from his father Muhammad ibn Ali, from his father Ali ibn al-Husayn, from his father al-Husayn ibn Ali, from his brother al-Hasan ibn Ali (peace be upon them all). He said: Amir al-Mu’minin (peace be upon him) said:
translations.ur: محمد بن القاسم نے ہمیں حدیث بیان کی، کہا: مجھ سے یوسف بن محمد بن زیاد اور علی بن محمد بن سیار نے اپنے دونوں والدین سے، تمام ائمہ علیہم السلام کی سند سے روایت کی۔ فرمایا: امیر المؤمنین علیہ السلام نے فرمایا:
translations.tr: Muhammed b. el-Kasim bize rivayet etti. Yusuf b. Muhammed b. Ziyad ve Ali b. Muhammed b. Seyyar babalari vasitasiyla el-Hasan b. Ali'den tum Imamlar silsilesiyle rivayet etti. Muminlerin Emiri (a.s.) buyurdu:
translations.fa: محمد بن قاسم از سلسله تمام ائمه علیهم السلام برای ما نقل کرد. امیرالمؤمنین علیه السلام فرمود:
translations.id: Muhammad bin al-Qasim menceritakan kepada kami melalui rantai seluruh Imam (alaihimus salam). Amirul Mukminin (alaihis salam) bersabda:
translations.bn: মুহাম্মাদ ইবনে আল-কাসিম সকল ইমামের সনদে আমাদের বর্ণনা করেছেন। আমীরুল মু’মিনীন আলাইহিস সালাম বলেছেন:
translations.es: Muhammad ibn al-Qasim nos narró a través de la cadena de todos los Imames (la paz sea con ellos). El Comandante de los Fieles (la paz sea con él) dijo:
translations.fr: Muhammad ibn al-Qasim nous a rapporté par la chaîne de tous les Imams (que la paix soit sur eux). Le Commandeur des Croyants (que la paix soit sur lui) a dit :
translations.de: Muhammad ibn al-Qasim berichtete uns durch die Kette aller Imame (Friede sei mit ihnen allen). Der Befehlshaber der Gläubigen (Friede sei mit ihm) sagte:
translations.ru: Мухаммад ибн аль-Касим рассказал нам через цепочку всех имамов (мир им всем). Повелитель правоверных (мир ему) сказал:
translations.zh: 穆罕默德·本·卡西姆通过所有伊玛目的传述链给我们讲述了。信士的长官（愿主赐他平安）说：
